caption: The video captures a view of a sports stadium at night under a dark sky, featuring rows of red seats and bright floodlights. The Real Madrid crest is visible in the upper right corner of each frame. Advertising banners are displayed along the stadium tiers, with legible text including "IDEAT", "PULEVA", and "Emirates FLY BETTER". A few individuals are seen in the lower foreground and on the sidelines; some are dressed in dark clothing, and one person appears to be wearing a red garment. The field is visible to the right, illuminated by the stadium lights. Between frames, the camera perspective shifts slightly, moving from a wider shot of the red seating and banners toward a darker, more angled view, before returning to a similar perspective as the initial scene, showing the illuminated stands and the adjacent green pitch.
